description: EP-09 — RSS / checker safety-constant provenance & sign-off manifest. Every entry is a declared `const` on a safety-relevant checker path. `status` is `pending` until a safety engineer records a sign-off (set `status` to `validated` and fill `provenance` with the evidence reference). ci/check_safety_constants.py verifies each declared value still matches this manifest on every CI run, and FAILS a release build (KIRRA_RELEASE_GATE=1) while any entry is `pending` — no silent placeholder can reach a release.

constants.name: RSS_REACTION_TIME_S
constants.provenance: IEEE 2846-2022 §5.1 canonical response time for SAE-L4 stacks (conservative end); awaiting #408 safety-case sign-off

constants.name: RSS_LAT_BRAKE_FRACTION
constants.provenance: WP-07 (#408 Option A) placeholder; fraction form keeps deratings tightening-or-equal (parko-core test_lat_split_conservative_vs_legacy); deployed value must be safety-case-derived

constants.name: RSS_MU_LATERAL_M
constants.provenance: IEEE 2846-2022 §5.2 lateral-fluctuation margin mu; additive so strictly conservative; placeholder pending #408 sign-off

constants.name: RSS_LATERAL_MOTION_EPS_MPS
constants.provenance: Cut-in stillness threshold for the RSS §4 conjunction (admits a stationary queue, catches any real lateral closing); value needs track-data confirmation

constants.name: OCCLUSION_SPEED_TOL_MPS
constants.provenance: Float-noise slack on the RSS-Rule-4 assured-clear-distance speed bound; sub-decimetre by construction, needs recorded sign-off that the slack is envelope-negligible

constants.name: DEFAULT_RSS_LATERAL_ALIGNMENT_TOLERANCE_M
constants.provenance: Robotaxi lane-width-scale lateral-alignment band (per-class VehicleConfig field default; docs/CONTRACT_PROFILES.md); VALIDATION-PENDING like the other class numbers

constants.name: DIVERGENCE_DEGRADE_MS
constants.provenance: True-Redundancy divergence-to-Degraded debounce; balances phantom-flicker tolerance vs detection latency; needs FTTI-budget sign-off

constants.name: DIVERGENCE_LOCKOUT_MS
constants.provenance: Sustained-divergence-to-MRC escalation window; needs FTTI-budget sign-off

constants.name: CTRV_YAW_EPS_RAD_S
constants.provenance: Yaw-rate floor below which CTRV degrades to CV (numerical conditioning of the turn-radius division); needs tracker-noise-floor confirmation

constants.name: CTRV_MAX_LATERAL_ACCEL_MPS2
constants.provenance: Physical-plausibility cap on a predicted mode's implied lateral acceleration (~1g); needs recorded sign-off vs the object-class dynamics envelope

constants.name: MAX_PREDICTION_STEPS
constants.provenance: Boundedness cap on mode rollout length (WCET/memory argument, not a tuning value); sign-off = confirm it exceeds every horizon/step-size pairing in the ODD

constants.name: LANE_FOLLOW_MIN_SPEED_MPS
constants.provenance: Speed floor below which a lane-follow mode is not synthesized (heading unreliable at standstill); needs tracker-noise-floor confirmation

constants.name: MAX_PEDESTRIANS
constants.provenance: Boundedness cap on the per-cycle VRU set (WCET argument); sign-off = confirm it exceeds the ODD's worst-case crossing crowd

constants.name: V_PED_MAX_FLOOR_MPS
constants.provenance: Pedestrian worst-case-speed floor (brisk walk); deployment-tunable per ODD (vru.rs design note); needs ODD sign-off

constants.name: VRU_STOP_EPSILON_CEILING_MPS
constants.provenance: Inherited by construction from the frozen gateway contract's STOP_EPSILON_MPS; sign-off = record the inheritance argument

constants.name: RSS_FAILSAFE_DISTANCE_M
constants.provenance: Fail-closed sentinel returned on invalid RSS inputs (NaN-division guard); sign-off = confirm it exceeds every finite safe-distance the ODD can produce

constants.name: RSS_LONGITUDINAL_CONFLICT_M
constants.provenance: FLOOR of the lateral-RSS longitudinal conflict window (#683/#684 — gates use max(floor, lon_required) so the window grows with closing speed); urban-minimum value needs ODD sign-off

constants.name: RSS_LONGITUDINAL_OVERLAP_M
constants.provenance: Passenger-vehicle footprint overlap (~two half-widths + fluctuation margin) gating longitudinal RSS; per-class values on VehicleConfig::rss_longitudinal_overlap_m (EP-08) derive from it; needs footprint-data sign-off

constants.name: RSS_LATERAL_MOTION_EPS_MPS
constants.provenance: Diverse-checker twin of the kirra-trajectory cut-in stillness threshold; must stay in lockstep with it; needs track-data confirmation
